title: Wapol Loses His Throne
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on wapol loses his throne, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Wapol Loses His Throne. Wapol loses control of the castle and the people’s fear as Luffy, Chopper, and the others push the tyrant back. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He came up here on his wools hippo,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So he can't have gone down the mountain without it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: it was when you were busy gushing over the transformations!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll find and finish him off quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Wait... don't tell me he went inside the castle!? If so, then Nami's in danger!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: If he lays even a finger on Nami, I'll kill him a hundred times over!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: This is my beautiful drum castle...!?

summary: This part highlights wapol loses his throne and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
